message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column where_cond/mask parity (frankenpandas-osly)

Adds where_cond and mask — the two sides of conditional replacement in
pandas:

- where_cond(cond, other) matches pd.Series.where(cond, other): keep
  values at true positions, replace false positions with `other`.
- mask(cond, other) matches pd.Series.mask(cond, other): logical
  inverse of where_cond.

Both validate that `cond` has Bool dtype and the same length as
`self`; mismatches return InvalidMaskType / LengthMismatch. Missing
cond entries propagate as Null(NaN) in the result (pandas convention —
NaN condition → NaN output).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
